title: Synchrony Commits $100 Million to Grow Minority-Owned Businesses
text: Invests in Ariel Alternatives' Project Black Fund to Scale Minority Businesses Investment Builds on Synchrony's Efforts to Advance Equity Among Diverse Businesses STAMFORD, Conn. , Feb. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a premier consumer financial services company, today announced a $100 million commitment in Ariel Alternatives' Project Black, which aims to scale sustainable minority-owned businesses and position them as leading suppliers to Fortune 500 companies.
